subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that guideth all peoples, and from it the light blazeth forth unto him that is possessed of true vision, lest any should go astray [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب یهدی العالمین جمیعا و یسطع النور عنه عند ذی بصر بصیرا لئلا یضل احد
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @light and darkness, @Manifestation of God as sun, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
